text: Being here, I feel a sense of curiosity mixed with a mild discomfort. The environment is modern, almost sterile, yet it’s imbued with a purposeful energy—as if ideas are incubating behind glass. The presence of R&D (Research + Development) evokes a spirit of experimentation, and the nearby philosophical text about feeling exposed and misunderstood resonates with my own inner dialogue. I am both a spectator and a participant, reflecting on the contrast between the public display of knowledge and the private uncertainties we each carry. Ultimately, my mind is alert and contemplative, alive to the possibility of new understanding in this bright, open space.
